channel.title: AI Press Review
channel.itunes:author: David Perron
channel.itunes:subtitle: Factual, Clear, Built for Busy Professionals
channel.itunes:summary: 80+ sources. 15 minutes. What matters in AI today.
channel.description: Tuesday through Friday at 7AM CET, AI Press Review distills 80+ global sources into a focused 15-minute briefing — filtered, weighted, and structured around six sections: AI News, Use Cases & Deployments, Tools & Practice, Weak Signals, Off the Radar, and Research. Built for professionals who need signal, not noise. Every Saturday: a weekly recap of the trends that defined the week. Also available in French at podcast.aequitus.net/fr.

item.title: DeepSeek V4 Resets Open-Source Pricing, DOJ Backs xAI in Colorado, and AI Costs Outpace Headcount
item.description: Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions. DeepSeek released V4 Pro on Friday — a 1.6 trillion parameter open-weight model priced at roughly one-fifth the cost of GPT-5.5, immediately pressuring proprietary model economics across the industry. On the deployment front, Meta signed a deal to run millions of AWS Graviton CPUs for agentic AI workloads, while Home Depot reported its AI voice agent identifies customer intent in ten seconds and resolves calls four times faster than legacy menu systems. Next week, watch for Anthropic's IPO valuation signals as the company navigates compounding product and pricing pressures, and monitor whether Colorado's AI regulation law survives the DOJ intervention filed Friday on behalf of xAI.
item.content:encoded: Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions. DeepSeek released V4 Pro on Friday — a 1.6 trillion parameter open-weight model priced at roughly one-fifth the cost of GPT-5.5, immediately pressuring proprietary model economics across the industry. On the deployment front, Meta signed a deal to run millions of AWS Graviton CPUs for agentic AI workloads, while Home Depot reported its AI voice agent identifies customer intent in ten seconds and resolves calls four times faster than legacy menu systems. Next week, watch for Anthropic's IPO valuation signals as the company navigates compounding product and pricing pressures, and monitor whether Colorado's AI regulation law survives the DOJ intervention filed Friday on behalf of xAI.
item.itunes:summary: Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions. DeepSeek released V4 Pro on Friday — a 1.6 trillion parameter open-weight model priced at roughly one-fifth the cost of GPT-5.5, immediately pressuring proprietary model economics across the industry. On the deployment front, Meta signed a deal to run millions of AWS Graviton CPUs for agentic AI workloads, while Home Depot reported its AI voice agent identifies customer intent in ten seconds and resolves calls four times faster than legacy menu systems. Next week, watch for Anthropic's IPO valuation signals as the company navigates compounding product and pricing pressures, and monitor whether Colorado's AI regulation law survives the DOJ intervention filed Friday on behalf of xAI.

item.title: DeepSeek V4 Drops, OpenAI Doubles Down, and the Programmer Job Market Cracks
item.description: Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions. DeepSeek released V4 on Friday — a 1.6 trillion parameter open-weight model with a one-million-token context window and native Huawei Ascend support — directly challenging Western frontier models at a fraction of the price. Meta signed a deal this Friday making it one of AWS's largest Graviton customers, while the IRS quietly scaled its AI applications from 10 to 126 since 2022. Next week, watch for Anthropic's IPO valuation signals and the US Justice Department's intervention in Colorado's AI regulation case, which heads to federal court.
item.content:encoded: Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions. DeepSeek released V4 on Friday — a 1.6 trillion parameter open-weight model with a one-million-token context window and native Huawei Ascend support — directly challenging Western frontier models at a fraction of the price. Meta signed a deal this Friday making it one of AWS's largest Graviton customers, while the IRS quietly scaled its AI applications from 10 to 126 since 2022. Next week, watch for Anthropic's IPO valuation signals and the US Justice Department's intervention in Colorado's AI regulation case, which heads to federal court.
item.itunes:summary: Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions. DeepSeek released V4 on Friday — a 1.6 trillion parameter open-weight model with a one-million-token context window and native Huawei Ascend support — directly challenging Western frontier models at a fraction of the price. Meta signed a deal this Friday making it one of AWS's largest Graviton customers, while the IRS quietly scaled its AI applications from 10 to 126 since 2022. Next week, watch for Anthropic's IPO valuation signals and the US Justice Department's intervention in Colorado's AI regulation case, which heads to federal court.

item.title: SpaceX bids $60B for Cursor, Google's dual TPU launch — Apr 23
item.description: SpaceX preempted a $2 billion Cursor fundraise with a $10 billion collaboration fee and a path to a $60 billion acquisition, marking the most aggressive AI coding bet by a non-software company to date. PayPal's commerce agent, powered by a fine-tuned Llama model and speculative decoding on a single H100, now matches the throughput of two H100s while cutting GPU costs by half. Practitioners should watch Alibaba's new open-weight Qwen model, which outperforms models fifteen times its size on agentic coding benchmarks, and OpenAI's workspace agents, which replace custom GPTs with persistent, background-running team automation.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX preempted a $2 billion Cursor fundraise with a $10 billion collaboration fee and a path to a $60 billion acquisition, marking the most aggressive AI coding bet by a non-software company to date. PayPal's commerce agent, powered by a fine-tuned Llama model and speculative decoding on a single H100, now matches the throughput of two H100s while cutting GPU costs by half. Practitioners should watch Alibaba's new open-weight Qwen model, which outperforms models fifteen times its size on agentic coding benchmarks, and OpenAI's workspace agents, which replace custom GPTs with persistent, background-running team automation.
item.itunes:summary: SpaceX preempted a $2 billion Cursor fundraise with a $10 billion collaboration fee and a path to a $60 billion acquisition, marking the most aggressive AI coding bet by a non-software company to date. PayPal's commerce agent, powered by a fine-tuned Llama model and speculative decoding on a single H100, now matches the throughput of two H100s while cutting GPU costs by half. Practitioners should watch Alibaba's new open-weight Qwen model, which outperforms models fifteen times its size on agentic coding benchmarks, and OpenAI's workspace agents, which replace custom GPTs with persistent, background-running team automation.

item.title: SpaceX bids $60B for Cursor, OpenAI goes enterprise — Apr 22
item.description: SpaceX secured an option to acquire AI coding startup Cursor for up to 60 billion dollars, while OpenAI launched Codex Labs with consulting partners including Accenture and PwC, targeting enterprise software teams at 4 million weekly active users. Revolut's proprietary model PRAGMA, trained on 40 billion transactions from 25 million customers, now makes autonomous credit and fraud decisions without relying on any third-party AI vendor. Practitioners should watch GitHub Copilot's pricing restructure — agentic compute costs are forcing token-based limits that will affect every team running long-horizon coding sessions.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX secured an option to acquire AI coding startup Cursor for up to 60 billion dollars, while OpenAI launched Codex Labs with consulting partners including Accenture and PwC, targeting enterprise software teams at 4 million weekly active users. Revolut's proprietary model PRAGMA, trained on 40 billion transactions from 25 million customers, now makes autonomous credit and fraud decisions without relying on any third-party AI vendor. Practitioners should watch GitHub Copilot's pricing restructure — agentic compute costs are forcing token-based limits that will affect every team running long-horizon coding sessions.
item.itunes:summary: SpaceX secured an option to acquire AI coding startup Cursor for up to 60 billion dollars, while OpenAI launched Codex Labs with consulting partners including Accenture and PwC, targeting enterprise software teams at 4 million weekly active users. Revolut's proprietary model PRAGMA, trained on 40 billion transactions from 25 million customers, now makes autonomous credit and fraud decisions without relying on any third-party AI vendor. Practitioners should watch GitHub Copilot's pricing restructure — agentic compute costs are forcing token-based limits that will affect every team running long-horizon coding sessions.

item.title: Anthropic's $100B compute bet: Amazon doubles down — Apr 21
item.description: Anthropic committed more than $100 billion over the next decade to secure up to 5 gigawatts of compute from Amazon, with Amazon investing $5 billion immediately and optioning up to $20 billion more. Boehringer Ingelheim opened a dedicated AI research centre in London, while the NSA was confirmed using Anthropic's most powerful unreleased model despite a Pentagon blacklist of the company. Practitioners should watch the MCP design vulnerability enabling remote code execution in Anthropic's agent protocol, and track the ONTO token-compression format that cuts JSON overhead by nearly half at scale.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic committed more than $100 billion over the next decade to secure up to 5 gigawatts of compute from Amazon, with Amazon investing $5 billion immediately and optioning up to $20 billion more. Boehringer Ingelheim opened a dedicated AI research centre in London, while the NSA was confirmed using Anthropic's most powerful unreleased model despite a Pentagon blacklist of the company. Practitioners should watch the MCP design vulnerability enabling remote code execution in Anthropic's agent protocol, and track the ONTO token-compression format that cuts JSON overhead by nearly half at scale.
item.itunes:summary: Anthropic committed more than $100 billion over the next decade to secure up to 5 gigawatts of compute from Amazon, with Amazon investing $5 billion immediately and optioning up to $20 billion more. Boehringer Ingelheim opened a dedicated AI research centre in London, while the NSA was confirmed using Anthropic's most powerful unreleased model despite a Pentagon blacklist of the company. Practitioners should watch the MCP design vulnerability enabling remote code execution in Anthropic's agent protocol, and track the ONTO token-compression format that cuts JSON overhead by nearly half at scale.

item.title: Amazon-Anthropic $100B pact: infrastructure war escalates — Apr 21
item.description: Anthropic committed to spend over $100 billion on Amazon infrastructure over the next decade, deepening a hardware-first partnership that locks in cloud compute at a scale no European or Asian rival can currently match. Salesforce's Agentforce lead-nurturing agents generated over $100 million in pipeline and more than 10,000 sales opportunities, the clearest enterprise ROI figure published this week. Practitioners should watch the Kimi K2.6 open-weight release — it runs up to 300 parallel agents and matches closed frontier models on coding benchmarks, making it the most capable freely available agentic model to date.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic committed to spend over $100 billion on Amazon infrastructure over the next decade, deepening a hardware-first partnership that locks in cloud compute at a scale no European or Asian rival can currently match. Salesforce's Agentforce lead-nurturing agents generated over $100 million in pipeline and more than 10,000 sales opportunities, the clearest enterprise ROI figure published this week. Practitioners should watch the Kimi K2.6 open-weight release — it runs up to 300 parallel agents and matches closed frontier models on coding benchmarks, making it the most capable freely available agentic model to date.
item.itunes:summary: Anthropic committed to spend over $100 billion on Amazon infrastructure over the next decade, deepening a hardware-first partnership that locks in cloud compute at a scale no European or Asian rival can currently match. Salesforce's Agentforce lead-nurturing agents generated over $100 million in pipeline and more than 10,000 sales opportunities, the clearest enterprise ROI figure published this week. Practitioners should watch the Kimi K2.6 open-weight release — it runs up to 300 parallel agents and matches closed frontier models on coding benchmarks, making it the most capable freely available agentic model to date.

item.title: Anthropic-White House Détente, Data Center Crunch, and the Cerebras IPO
item.description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei met with White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles on Friday to resolve a Pentagon dispute over the Mythos model, while the EU simultaneously pressed Anthropic on cybersecurity risks — making it the week's defining geopolitical AI story. On the deployment front, World ID expanded its iris-scanning identity protocol to Zoom, Shopify, and Tinder on Friday, targeting the human-verification gap created by proliferating AI agents. Next week, the House Foreign Affairs Committee takes up the Deterring American AI Model Theft Act, which would sanction Chinese firms accused of query-and-copy attacks on US models.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei met with White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles on Friday to resolve a Pentagon dispute over the Mythos model, while the EU simultaneously pressed Anthropic on cybersecurity risks — making it the week's defining geopolitical AI story. On the deployment front, World ID expanded its iris-scanning identity protocol to Zoom, Shopify, and Tinder on Friday, targeting the human-verification gap created by proliferating AI agents. Next week, the House Foreign Affairs Committee takes up the Deterring American AI Model Theft Act, which would sanction Chinese firms accused of query-and-copy attacks on US models.
item.itunes:summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei met with White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles on Friday to resolve a Pentagon dispute over the Mythos model, while the EU simultaneously pressed Anthropic on cybersecurity risks — making it the week's defining geopolitical AI story. On the deployment front, World ID expanded its iris-scanning identity protocol to Zoom, Shopify, and Tinder on Friday, targeting the human-verification gap created by proliferating AI agents. Next week, the House Foreign Affairs Committee takes up the Deterring American AI Model Theft Act, which would sanction Chinese firms accused of query-and-copy attacks on US models.

item.title: Factory hits $1.5B: AI coding's breakout moment — Apr 17
item.description: Factory raises $150 million at a $1.5 billion valuation for AI coding tools. OpenAI launches a pharma-focused model while expanding ChatGPT ads. The UK commits $675 million to sovereign AI infrastructure, and IBM unveils security services for agentic attacks.
item.content:encoded: Factory raises $150 million at a $1.5 billion valuation for AI coding tools. OpenAI launches a pharma-focused model while expanding ChatGPT ads. The UK commits $675 million to sovereign AI infrastructure, and IBM unveils security services for agentic attacks.
item.itunes:summary: Factory raises $150 million at a $1.5 billion valuation for AI coding tools. OpenAI launches a pharma-focused model while expanding ChatGPT ads. The UK commits $675 million to sovereign AI infrastructure, and IBM unveils security services for agentic attacks.
